title: Verbose Spoken Intent Capture
one_liner: Speak the whole situation. The LLM compresses verbose intent better than humans type perfect prompts.
problem: Typed prompts are terse, linear and pre-cleaned. The leftover context — hunches, edge cases, 'not like this' — is what the LLM actually needs.
solution: Speak freely, including uncertainty and non-goals. The LLM transcribes, clusters, normalises; raw audio stays as evidence.
